mapper.select: SELECT 'purchaser' AS comboCd , USER_CD AS comboVal , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboLabel , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboTooltip , '' AS selectedValue FROM DOCS_USER docsUser INNER JOIN DOCS_DEPT docsDept ON docsDept.DEPT_CD = docsUser.DEPT_CD -- WHERE docsDept.PURCHASE_YN = 'Y' /* 구매팀 */ WHERE docsUser.auth_approval_level = 1 AND docsUser.DEL_YN = 'N' AND docsUser.USE_YN = 'Y' AND docsUser.BUSINESS_AREA_CD = #{businessAreaCd} ORDER BY USER_NM

SELECT 'purchaser' AS comboCd , purchaser.DIST_PURCHASER_USER_CD AS comboVal , docsUser.USER_NM || '[' || docsUser.USER_ID || ']' AS comboLabel , docsUser.USER_NM || '[' || docsUser.USER_ID || ']' AS comboTooltip FROM DOCS_USER docsUser WHERE 1=0 ORDER BY USER_NM
SELECT 'teamLeaderList' AS comboCd , USER_CD AS comboVal , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboLabel , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboTooltip FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = #{userCd}

SELECT 'purchaser' AS comboCd , USER_CD AS comboVal , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboLabel , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboTooltip FROM DOCS_USER docsUser INNER JOIN DOCS_DEPT docsDept ON docsDept.DEPT_CD = docsUser.DEPT_CD -- WHERE docsDept.PURCHASE_YN = 'Y' /* 구매팀 */ WHERE docsUser.auth_approval_level = 1 AND docsUser.BUSINESS_AREA_CD = #{businessAreaCd} ORDER BY USER_NM

/* 모든 구매담당자. 리스트 검색조건에서 사용하기 위함. - USER_ID 사용 */ SELECT 'purchaser' AS comboCd , USER_ID AS comboVal , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboLabel , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboTooltip FROM DOCS_USER docsUser INNER JOIN DOCS_DEPT docsDept ON docsDept.DEPT_CD = docsUser.DEPT_CD WHERE docsDept.PURCHASE_YN = 'Y' /* 구매팀 */ ORDER BY USER_NM

SELECT 'purchaser' AS comboCd , USER_ID AS comboVal , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboLabel , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboTooltip , '' AS selectedValue FROM DOCS_USER docsUser INNER JOIN DOCS_DEPT docsDept ON docsDept.DEPT_CD = docsUser.DEPT_CD -- WHERE docsDept.PURCHASE_YN = 'Y' /* 구매팀 */ WHERE docsUser.auth_approval_level = 1 AND docsUser.DEL_YN = 'N' AND docsUser.USE_YN = 'Y' AND docsUser.BUSINESS_AREA_CD = #{businessAreaCd} ORDER BY USER_NM

SELECT 'purchaser' AS comboCd , USER_CD AS comboVal , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboLabel , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboTooltip , '' AS selectedValue FROM DOCS_USER docsUser INNER JOIN DOCS_DEPT docsDept ON docsDept.DEPT_CD = docsUser.DEPT_CD WHERE docsDept.PURCHASE_YN = 'Y' /* 구매팀 */ AND docsUser.DEL_YN = 'N' AND docsUser.USE_YN = 'Y' AND docsUser.BUSINESS_AREA_CD = #{businessAreaCd} ORDER BY USER_NM

SELECT 'purchaser' AS comboCd , USER_ID AS comboVal , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboLabel , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboTooltip , '' AS selectedValue FROM DOCS_USER docsUser INNER JOIN DOCS_DEPT docsDept ON docsDept.DEPT_CD = docsUser.DEPT_CD WHERE docsDept.PURCHASE_YN = 'Y' /* 구매팀 */ AND docsUser.DEL_YN = 'N' AND docsUser.USE_YN = 'Y' AND docsUser.BUSINESS_AREA_CD = #{businessAreaCd} ORDER BY USER_NM

SELECT 'vendorUser' AS comboCd , USER_CD AS comboVal , USER_NM AS comboLabel , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboTooltip FROM DOCS_USER docsUser WHERE docsUser.USE_YN = 'Y' AND docsUser.DEL_YN = 'N' AND docsUser.COMPANY_CD = #{sessionUser.companyCd}

SELECT 'vendorUser' AS comboCd , USER_ID AS comboVal , USER_NM AS comboLabel , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS comboTooltip FROM DOCS_USER docsUser /*WHERE docsUser.USE_YN = 'Y' AND docsUser.DEL_YN = 'N'*/ WHERE docsUser.COMPANY_CD = #{sessionUser.companyCd}

SELECT X.* FROM ( SELECT USER_CD AS id , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS text , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS title , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY USER_NM) AS pageindex FROM DOCS_USER WHERE COMPANY_CD != #{companyCd} /* 로그인한 사용자의 companyCd*/
AND USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{term} || '%'
AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' ) X
WHERE PAGEINDEX BETWEEN #{posStart} AND #{count} * #{page}

SELECT X.* FROM ( SELECT USER_CD AS id , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS text , USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS title , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY USER_NM) AS pageindex FROM DOCS_USER WHERE COMPANY_CD = #{companyCd} /* 로그인한 사용자의 companyCd*/
AND USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{term} || '%'
AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' ) X
WHERE PAGEINDEX BETWEEN #{posStart} AND #{count} * #{page}
SELECT X.* FROM ( SELECT '' AS text , '' AS id WHERE 1=0 ) X LIMIT 10

SELECT X.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY text) AS pageindex FROM ( SELECT DOC_USER.USER_NM || '[' || USER_ID || ']' AS text , DOC_USER.USER_CD AS id FROM DOCS_USER DOC_USER WHERE 1=1
AND DOC_USER.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}
AND DOC_USER.USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{term} || '%'
AND DOC_USER.DEL_YN = 'N' AND DOC_USER.USE_YN = 'Y' ) X
SELECT * FROM DOCS_USER WHERE 1=0

/* 로그인한 사용자의 팀장 조회 */ SELECT 'teamLeader' AS comboCd , DOC_USER.USER_NM AS comboLabel , DOC_USER.USER_CD AS comboVal FROM DOCS_USER DOC_USER WHERE DOC_USER.USER_CD = ( SELECT CASE WHEN A.TEAM_LEADER_USER_CD IS NOT NULL THEN A.TEAM_LEADER_USER_CD ELSE (SELECT B.TEAM_LEADER_USER_CD FROM DOCS_DEPT B WHERE B.DEPT_CD = A.PARENT_DEPT_CD ) END TEAM_LEADER_USER_CD FROM DOCS_DEPT A WHERE A.DEPT_CD = #{sessionUser.deptCd} )
SELECT DOC_USER.USER_CD FROM DOCS_USER DOC_USER WHERE DOC_USER.USER_CD = ( SELECT TEAM_LEADER_USER_CD FROM DOCS_DEPT WHERE DEFENSE_TEAM_YN = 'Y' )

SELECT 'defTeamLaderList' AS comboCd , DOC_USER.USER_NM AS comboLabel , DOC_USER.USER_CD AS comboVal FROM DOCS_USER DOC_USER WHERE DOC_USER.USER_CD = ( SELECT TEAM_LEADER_USER_CD FROM DOCS_DEPT WHERE DEFENSE_TEAM_YN = 'Y' )
/* 방산기술보호 결재자 리스트 조회(개발) */ SELECT 'productProtectUserList' AS comboCd , USER_NM || '[' || DEPT_NM || ']' AS comboLabel , USER_CD AS comboVal FROM DOCS_USER WHERE 1 = 0
/* 방산기술보호 결재자 리스트 조회(양산) */ SELECT 'developmentProtectUserList' AS comboCd , USER_NM || '[' || DEPT_NM || ']' AS comboLabel , USER_CD AS comboVal FROM DOCS_USER WHERE 1 = 0

SELECT 'securityTeam' AS comboCd , USER_CD AS comboVal , USER_NM AS comboLabel , USER_NM || '[' || NVL((SELECT LANG_DESC FROM DOCS_LANG WHERE LANG_CD = combo.VALUE), combo.TEXT) || ']' AS comboTooltip FROM DOCS_USER docsUser INNER JOIN DOCS_COMBO combo ON docsUser.WORK_PLACE_CD = combo.VALUE AND combo.COMBO_CD = 'workPlaceCd' WHERE docsUser.DEPT_CD IN ('D1DV1C0', 'D1DC1C0', 'D1DJ1C0') AND docsUser.USE_YN = 'Y' AND docsUser.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY docsUser.DEPT_CD

SELECT USER_CD FROM DOCS_USER WHERE BUSINESS_AREA_CD = #{sessionUser.businessAreaCd} AND WORK_PLACE_CD = #{sessionUser.workPlaceCd} AND DEPT_CD IN ('D1DV1C0', 'D1DC1C0', 'D1DJ1C0') AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT * FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = ( SELECT TEAM_LEADER_USER_CD FROM DOCS_DEPT WHERE DEPT_CD = ( SELECT DEPT_CD FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{purchaserUid} ) ) AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N'
/* 방산자료 결재 이관 대상 */ SELECT 'passTarget' AS comboCd , docsUser.USER_CD AS comboVal , docsUser.USER_NM AS comboLabel FROM DOCS_USER docsUser WHERE 1 = 0
/* 배포부서 - 생산기술자료팀만 배포함 */ SELECT 'deployDept' AS comboCd , DEPT_CD AS comboVal , DEPT_NM AS comboLabel FROM DOCS_DEPT WHERE PRODUCT_TEAM_YN = 'Y' AND USE_YN='Y' AND DEL_YN='N' ORDER BY DEPT_NM

/* 배포자 - 생산기술자료팀만 배포함 */ SELECT 'deployUser' AS comboCd , dUser.USER_CD AS comboVal , dUser.USER_NM || '[' || dUser.USER_ID || ']' AS comboLabel FROM DOCS_DEPT dDept INNER JOIN DOCS_USER dUser ON dUser.DEPT_CD = dDept.DEPT_CD WHERE PRODUCT_TEAM_YN = 'Y' AND dUser.USE_YN='Y' AND dUser.DEL_YN='N' ORDER BY dUser.USER_NM
/* 생산기술자료 배포받을(접수할) 부서 - '직'만 접수함 */ SELECT 'deployDept' AS comboCd , DEPT_CD AS comboVal , DEPT_NM AS comboLabel FROM DOCS_DEPT WHERE DEPT_TYPE = '직' AND USE_YN='Y' AND DEL_YN='N' ORDER BY DEPT_NM
SELECT USER_CD AS comboVal , USER_NM AS comboLabel FROM DOCS_USER WHERE DEPT_CD = #{sessionUser.deptCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT docsUser.USER_CD AS comboVal , docsUser.USER_NM AS comboLabel FROM DOCS_USER docsUser WHERE docsUser.COMPANY_CD = #{sessionUser.companyCd} AND docsUser.USE_YN = 'Y' AND docsUser.DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT docsUser.USER_CD AS comboVal , docsUser.USER_NM AS comboLabel FROM DOCS_USER docsUser WHERE (AUTH_APPROVAL_LEVEL = 2) AND USER_CD != #{sessionUser.userCd} AND docsUser.USE_YN = 'Y' AND docsUser.DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT docsUser.USER_CD AS comboVal , docsUser.USER_NM || '[' || docsUser.USER_ID || ']' AS comboLabel FROM DOCS_USER docsUser WHERE USER_CD != #{sessionUser.userCd} AND docsUser.USE_YN = 'Y' AND docsUser.DEL_YN = 'N' AND docsUser.AUTH_SITE = 'I' AND docsUser.BUSINESS_AREA_CD = #{sessionUser.businessAreaCd} ORDER BY docsUser.USER_NM

SELECT docsUser.USER_CD AS comboVal , docsUser.USER_NM || '[' || docsDept.DEPT_NM || ']' AS comboLabel FROM DOCS_USER docsUser , DOCS_DEPT docsDept WHERE docsUser.DEPT_CD = docsDept.DEPT_CD AND docsUser.USE_YN = 'Y' AND docsUser.DEL_YN = 'N' AND docsUser.AUTH_SITE = 'I' AND docsUser.Position_Cd IS NOT NULL ORDER BY docsUser.USER_NM
SELECT '' AS comboVal , '' AS comboLabel FROM DOCS_USER WHERE 1=0

/* 사용자코드로 부서를 구한다.*/ SELECT docsDept.DEPT_CD AS comboVal , docsDept.DEPT_NM AS comboLabel FROM DOCS_USER docsUser INNER JOIN DOCS_DEPT docsDept ON docsDept.DEPT_CD = docsUser.DEPT_CD WHERE USER_CD = #{userCd}
